onlyOnDesktop.rationale: Desktop in-app changelog route surfaces the repo changelog; the web docs portal uses a separate engineering navigation IA.
Product docs page under desktop IA; not duplicated as a portal entry (web portal focuses on engineering specs and runbooks).
Desktop reference doc for in-app readers; web exposes `docs/frontend-api-reference.md` instead for the same product surface.
Desktop-packaged CLI reference; engineering deep-dives live under `docs/` in the portal, not this bundled copy.
Desktop concepts hub; portal indexes different engineering documents under `docs/`.
Desktop security chapter; portal does not yet mirror this page as a standalone markdown entry.
Desktop guides landing; portal lists guides across `docs/` paths with different titles and IA.
Desktop docs home shell; portal uses `docs/README.md` as the primary markdown index instead.
Desktop install guide bundled for the app; maintainer release detail lives in README-linked `docs/` pages.
Bundled as desktop concept route; web docs portal omits this spike path from the sidebar IA.
Desktop reference landing; portal splits reference material across multiple `docs/` entries.
Desktop upgrades page; portal summarizes shipping in `docs/releases.md`; deeper runbooks stay README-linked.
Desktop security hub; portal does not expose an equivalent single markdown route in `DOCS_PORTAL_SECTIONS`.
Desktop “start with Pharos” product doc; portal starts from `docs/README.md` and engineering onboarding docs.
Desktop trust chapter; portal has no matching path entry today.
Desktop product explainer; high-level positioning in portal is split across README and `docs/positioning.md`.

onlyOnWeb.rationale: Contributor conventions for humans/IDE; not bundled into the desktop in-app docs router.
Architecture cheat sheet for agent tooling; desktop IA targets end users, not this file.
Contributor guide at repo root; linked from portal but not from desktop packaged docs routes.
Repository overview linked from portal; desktop routes use `apps/desktop/.../home.md` for the in-app home.
Portal index markdown; desktop uses `apps/desktop/src/docs/content/home.md` as the packaged home page.
Mermaid-based architecture diagrams for the web portal; desktop product IA explains concepts in prose without this path.
Explains bundled docs semver for the web portal; desktop product docs do not ship this standalone markdown path.
Cross-surface comparison for evaluators; desktop product IA covers the same themes in prose pages.
Dashboard event-stream behavior; desktop end-user docs do not bundle this engineering-oriented path.
HTTP/WebSocket contracts for Solid; desktop references use `api-contracts.md` under packaged content.
Clone-and-make quickstart for the open-source dashboard; desktop guides cover install flows instead.
Dev-oriented desktop setup alongside make targets; packaged desktop docs use `install-desktop.md`.
VPS / remote daemon client guide; not wired into desktop DocsRoute list.
Public positioning summary for README maintainers; duplicated theme lives in desktop product copy, not this path.
Full maintainer release workflow; desktop ships user-facing upgrade guidance instead.
Security reviewer explainer for web portal; desktop has trust chapter prose instead of this single file.
Concept explainer for web docs portal; concepts are split across desktop concept routes.
